name: Industrial Hardening
desc: Production-ready channels (7), prompt injection shield, memory hardening, multi-agent routing, LLM queue, E2E testing in CI.

name: Opening to the Outside World
desc: Remote access (SSH/Tailscale/reverse proxy), OpenAI-compatible API, trusted device model, CSRF protection, 17 MCP recipes, OpenAPI spec.

name: Native installers + Observability
desc: Native .deb / .rpm / signed+notarized .dmg / Homebrew tap / Windows-via-WSL2. Prometheus /metrics, X-Request-ID trace propagation, panic handler with redacted crash reports, daily update checker.

name: Mobile companion (thread-first)
desc: Flutter app with QR pairing, inline approval blocks, biometric lock, cross-stack fixture contract (Rust ↔ Flutter), client-side redact for sensitive data.

name: Consumer Polish
desc: Public website redesign, full i18n (EN+IT), documentation site refresh, mobile push notifications, offline message queue, app store publishing.

name: Strategic Expansion
desc: PWA with push notifications, webhook ingress templates, advanced multi-agent routing, UI redesign, voice channels (deferred).
